summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RemedyPills Pharmacy mobile app - all core functionality working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Some quick action button selectors not found after first click

design_issues.issue: Facebook login shows HTTPS warning in development
design_issues.note: Expected in HTTP development environment - not a functional issue

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with hero text
Admin dashboard loads with all required tabs
Patient registration with all required fields
Bottom navigation works (Home, Rx, Reminders, Care, Health, Account tabs)
Emergency notice modal displays and can be dismissed
Backend API: Patient registration and login
Backend API: All authenticated endpoints (prescriptions, appointments, reminders, etc.)
Backend API: Security - protected admin endpoints

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor selector issues with some quick actions)
